name: claude-course-skills
description: Skills that turn a GitHub repo, book, or PDF into hands-on, self-paced Jupyter-notebook courses — with an AI tutor that quizzes you through them.

plugins.name: course-skills
plugins.description: Turn any GitHub repo, book, or PDF into a hands-on, self-paced course of Jupyter notebooks — then have an AI tutor teach it to you. Bundles build-course, teach-course, and update-course.
